titleStmt.title: SII 24.421: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 421. (A.R. No. 2 of 1938-39.) II PRĀKĀRA, EAST WALL.

summary.p: Registers gift of the village Kaḍambaṅkuṟichchi in Kiḻaṅgu-nāḍu included in Rājarājapurachchāvaḍi for daily offerings of curd-rice (dadhyōdana) to goddess Uṟaiyūr-valli Nāchchiyār and for offerings to god Raṅganātha during the Śrī-Rāmanavami festival, by Oṁkarāja Chennaya Bālayadēva Mahārāja who has a number of birudas such as Uṟaiyūr-puravarādhīśvara, Chōḷakula-tilaka, etc. A share of every item of these offerings is assigned to Kōvil Vaṭṭamaṇi-Embār Aiyyaṅgār. Also records at the end in Sanskrit verses written in Grantha, a gift of a jewelled gold garland with a pendant to the goddess by the same chief. (See No. 403 above). The details of the date viz. Śaka 1457, Manmatha, Karkaṭaka, ba. 15, Wednesday, Punarpūśam correspond regularly to 1535 A.D., June 30, Wednesday, ·44, ·69. There was a solar eclipse on this day, not mentioned in the record.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrīman mahārājādhirāja rāja parameśvara śrīvirapratāpa śrīvira Accyatadevamahārāyar pṛthivirājyam paṇṇiaruḷāniṉṟa śakābdam 1000 4 100 5 10 7- Itaṉ melc cellaniṉṟa manmathasamvatsarattu karkkaṭakanāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu Amāvāsaiyum putavāramum peṟṟa puṇarpūca nakṣatrattunāḷ perumāḷ śrīraṅganātha devar śrīpaṇṭārattukku kāśyapagotrattu śrīman mahā maṇḍaleśvaran
Uṟaiūr puravarādhiśvaran coḷakulatilaka kāverivallabha virutu gajāsimha māna OṅkarājaccennaBelow the lineya bālaya devamahārājāvin dharmmamāka cilāśāsanam paṇṇikuṭuttapaṭi . nācciyār Uṟaiyūr vallinācciyāṟku nāḷ Oṉṟukku nammuṭaiya Upaiyam Āka Amutu cey(yi)taruḷak kaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭa daddhyodanam taḷikai Oṉṟukku AmutuBelow the linepaṭi tayiramutu neyyamutu Elamutu palacampāram Erikarumpu Uṭpaṭṭa nāḷ Oṉṟukku pukavaḍa6is a mistake for ®Āka
nāḷ 3 100 6 10 5kku kūṭṭiṉa poṉ 5 10 Ituvum perumāḷ śrīrāmanavami kaṭṭaḷaikku Amutu ceytaruḷa kaṭṭaḷaiyiṭṭa pori Amutu 4 100 Ituvum Adirasam . 2 100 4 . Itu vum vaṭai 2 100 4 . Ituvum cukiyaṉ . 2 100 4 . Ituvum pānakakkūṉ . 10 . taḷikai 4 10 cantaṉam paṭi . 2 10 . Aṭaikkāy Amutu Ilai Amutu Uḷppaṭṭa vakaikkuc cilavu poṉ . 10 . Inta tirunāḷukku paccaivaṭam 1 kullā vilaikku poṉ . 5 . Āka śrīrāmanavamittirunāḷ kaṭṭaḷaikku varuṣam . 1 . kku ḷa 10 5 .m
Ituvum nammuṭaiya Upayam Āka perumāḷ śrīraṅganāthadevaṟku kaṟi Amutu tiruppaṭit taram naṭakkumpaṭikku koṇṭu cetta toppu payiṟceyyiṟa Āḷ Ilakkaikku varuṣam . 1 . kku poṉ 5 Āka . poṉ . 7 10 . Āka Inta vakaippaṭikku varuṣam Oṉṟukku poṉ Eḻupatukkum tiruviḷaiāṭṭam Āka cetta Irācarācapurac cāvaṭikkuc cellum kiḻaṅkunāṭu kaṭampaṅkuṟicci Ūr . 1 . kku Intak kaṭampaṅkuṟicci Ūr 1- kku nāṉkellaikkuḷpaṭṭa nañcey
puñcey nattam paṭukaittiṭar māvaṭai maravaṭai Uḷpaṭa perumāḷ śrīpaṇṭārattile tiruviḷai Āṭṭamāka paṟṟukkaṭṭikkoṇṭu Inta Ūril Utaiyam koṇṭe varuṣam varuṣam toṟum Ācantrārkkasthāyiyāka Inta vakaippaṭi celavuutuRead celvatuperumāḷ śrīpaṇṭārattile naṭattivarakkaṭavarākavum . Ippaṭi dharmmaśilāśāsanam paṇṇik kuṭutteṉ perumāḷ śrīraṅganāthadevaṟkku bālayadevamahārājāveṉ Inta vakai
kku viṭṭavaṉ viḻukkāṭu daddhyodanam taḷikai Oṉṟil nālil Oṉṟum śrīrāma navami ciṟappil pori Amutu tiruppaṇṇiyāram taḷikai Ivaikaḷil viṭṭavaṉ viḻukkāṭu kaṭṭaḷaippaṭi Uḷḷatum kovil vaṭṭamaṇi Empār Ayyaṅkārukku Ācandrārkkasthāyi Āka rpatrapautra paramparai Āka naṭakkakkaṭavatākavum § dāna pālanayormmaddhye dānācśreyonu pālanam .
dānāt svarggamavāpnoti pālanādaccyutam padam § śrībālarājo nicuḷā ramāyā daddhyodanasyāpi nivedanārttham . prabhātakāle paripūrṇasasyam grāmandadau coḷakulapradīpaḥ . śrīrāmasya jayantyāñca viśeṣārādhanam śubhamḥ raṅgeśanicuḷādevyāḥ kṛūptavān bālabhūpatiḥ . prādatta bālanṛpatirnnicuḷāramaāyāstāṭaṅkaratna makuṭādi vibhūṣaṇ[āni] sauvarṇakañcukavaram maṇipādukā
mapyārādhanopakaraṇānyapirājatāni . muktāvaiḍūryya vajrādi maṇibhissu virājitam . padakam raṅgarājāya prādāt bālayabhūvatiḥ . Inta cilāśāsanam Eḻutinamaikku Ikkovil kaṇakku śrīraṅganāraāyaṇapriyaṉ Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 24.421 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
